name: master-ball
shortEffect: Catches a wild Pokémon every time.

name: ultra-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 2×.

name: great-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 1.5×.

name: poke-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.

name: safari-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon in the Great Marsh or Safari Zone.  Success rate is 1.5×.

name: net-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for water and bug Pokémon.

name: dive-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 3.5× when underwater, fishing, or surfing.

name: nest-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.9× for level 1 Pokémon, and drops steadily to 1× at level 30.

name: repeat-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for previously-caught Pokémon.

name: timer-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate increases by 0.1× (Gen V: 0.3×) every turn, to a max of 4×.

name: luxury-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon start with 200 happiness.

name: premier-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.

name: dusk-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.5× at night and in caves.

name: heal-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon are immediately healed.

name: quick-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 4× (Gen V: 5×), but only on the first turn.

name: cherish-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.

shortEffect: Cures any status ailment and confusion.

name: sun-stone
shortEffect: Evolves a Cottonee into Whimsicott, a Gloom into Bellossom, a Petilil into Lilligant, or a Sunkern into Sunflora.

name: moon-stone
shortEffect: Evolves a Clefairy into Clefable, a Jigglypuff into Wigglytuff, a Munna into Musharna, a Nidorina into Nidoqueen, a Nidorino into Nidoking, or a Skitty into Delcatty.

name: fire-stone
shortEffect: Evolves an Eevee into Flareon, a Growlithe into Arcanine, a Pansear into Simisear, or a Vulpix into Ninetales.

name: thunder-stone
shortEffect: Evolves an Eelektrik into Eelektross, an Eevee into Jolteon, or a Pikachu into Raichu.

name: water-stone
shortEffect: Evolves an Eevee into Vaporeon, a Lombre into Ludicolo, a Panpour into Simipour, a Poliwhirl into Poliwrath, a Shellder into Cloyster, or a Staryu into Starmie.

name: leaf-stone
shortEffect: Evolves an Exeggcute into Exeggutor, a Gloom into Vileplume, a Nuzleaf into Shiftry, a Pansage into Simisage, or a Weepinbell into Victreebel.

name: shiny-stone
shortEffect: Evolves a Minccino into Cinccino, a Roselia into Roserade, or a Togetic into Togekiss.

name: dusk-stone
shortEffect: Evolves a Lampent into Chandelure, a Misdreavus into Mismagius, or a Murkrow into Honchkrow.

name: dawn-stone
shortEffect: Evolves a male Kirlia into Gallade or a female Snorunt into Froslass.

name: oval-stone
shortEffect: Level-up during Day on a Happiny: Holder evolves into Chansey.

name: lustrous-orb

shortEffect: Held: Half the experience from a battle is split between Pokémon holding this item.

shortEffect: Held: Holder has a 3/16 (18.75%) chance to move first.

shortEffect: Held: Doubles the happiness earned by the holder.

shortEffect: Held: Increases Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

shortEffect: Held: Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder last 8 rounds instead of 5.

shortEffect: Held: Holder’s moves inflict 30% extra damage, but cost 10% max HP.

shortEffect: Held: Both turns of a two-turn charge move happen at once. Consumed upon use.

name: quick-powder
shortEffect: Doubles Ditto’s Speed when held. The boost is lost after transforming.

name: focus-sash
shortEffect: Held: Holder survives any single-hit attack at 1 HP if at max HP, then the item is consumed.

name: zoom-lens
shortEffect: Held: Provides a 1/5 (20%) boost in accuracy if the holder moves after the target.

name: metronome
shortEffect: Held: Consectutive uses of the same attack have a cumulative damage boost of 10%. Maximum 100% boost.

name: iron-ball
shortEffect: Held: Holder’s Speed is halved. Negates all Ground-type immunities, and makes Flying-types take neutral damage from Ground-type moves. Arena Trap. Spikes, and Toxic Spikes affect the holder.

name: lagging-tail
shortEffect: Held: Holder moves last in its priority bracket.

name: destiny-knot
shortEffect: Held: Infatuates opposing Pokémon when holder is inflicted with infatuation.

name: black-sludge
shortEffect: Held: Poison-type holder recovers 1/16 (6.25%) max HP each turn. Non-Poison-Types take 1/8 (12.5%) max HP damage.

name: icy-rock
shortEffect: Held: Hail by the holder lasts 8 rounds instead of 5.

name: smooth-rock
shortEffect: Held: Sandstorm by the holder lasts 8 rounds instead of 5.

name: heat-rock
shortEffect: Held: Sunny Day by the holder lasts 8 rounds instead of 5.

name: damp-rock
shortEffect: Held: Rain Dance by the holder lasts 8 rounds instead of 5.

name: grip-claw
shortEffect: Held: Holder’s multi-turn trapping moves last 5 turns.

name: choice-scarf
shortEffect: Held: Increases Speed by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

name: sticky-barb
shortEffect: Held: Holder takes 1/8 (12.5%) its max HP at the end of each turn. When the holder is hit by a contact move, the attacking Pokémon takes 1/8 its max HP in damage and receive the item if not holding one.

shortEffect: Held: Increases Special Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.

name: lure-ball

name: level-ball

name: moon-ball
shortEffect: 4× effectiveness on familes of Pokémon with a Moon Stone evolution. Made from Ylw Apricorn.

name: heavy-ball
shortEffect: Has flat bonus or penalty to catch rate depending on weight class of target. Made from Blk Apricorn.

name: fast-ball
shortEffect: 4× effectiveness on Pokémon with 100 or greater base speed. (Gen II: Roaming or Fleeing Pokémon). Made from Wht Apricorn.

name: friend-ball
shortEffect: Caught Pokémon start with 200 happiness. Made from Grn Apricorn.

name: love-ball
shortEffect: 8× effectiveness on opposite sex, same species targets of the Active Pokémon. Made from Pnk Apricorn.

name: park-ball
shortEffect: Catches Pokémon in the Pal Park every time.

name: sport-ball
shortEffect: Tries to catch a Pokémon in the Bug-Catching contest in National Park. (Gen II: Park Ball)
